# Juniper SRX Security Policy Configuration
# Format: set commands (show configuration | display set)
# Device: srx-fw-01.corp.example.com

# ============================================================
# Address Book — Trust Zone
# ============================================================
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address mgmt-network 10.0.0.0/24
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address app-servers 10.3.1.0/24
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address db-servers 10.2.1.0/24
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address-set all-internal address mgmt-network
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address-set all-internal address app-servers
set security zones security-zone trust address-book address-set all-internal address db-servers

# ============================================================
# Address Book — DMZ Zone
# ============================================================
set security zones security-zone dmz address-book address web-servers 10.1.1.0/24
set security zones security-zone dmz address-book address app-servers-dmz 10.3.1.0/24

# ============================================================
# Address Book — Untrust Zone
# ============================================================
set security zones security-zone untrust address-book address internet-any 0.0.0.0/0

# ============================================================
# Custom Applications
# ============================================================
set applications application app-mysql protocol tcp
set applications application app-mysql destination-port 3306

set applications application app-ssh protocol tcp
set applications application app-ssh destination-port 22

set applications application app-http protocol tcp
set applications application app-http destination-port 80

set applications application app-https protocol tcp
set applications application app-https destination-port 443

set applications application app-svc-range protocol tcp
set applications application app-svc-range destination-port 8080-8089

# Application Sets
set applications application-set web-services application app-http
set applications application-set web-services application app-https

set applications application-set mgmt-services application app-ssh

# ============================================================
# Security Policies — untrust to dmz (inbound web traffic)
# ============================================================
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy allow-web-inbound match source-address any
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy allow-web-inbound match destination-address web-servers
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy allow-web-inbound match application web-services
set security policies from-zone untrust to-zone dmz policy allow-web-inbound then permit

# ============================================================
# Security Policies — dmz to trust (app to DB)
# ============================================================
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-from-app match source-address app-servers-dmz
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-from-app match destination-address db-servers
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-from-app match application app-mysql
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-from-app then permit

set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-app-svc-ports match source-address app-servers-dmz
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-app-svc-ports match destination-address db-servers
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-app-svc-ports match application app-svc-range
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-app-svc-ports then permit

set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy deny-dmz-to-trust match source-address any
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy deny-dmz-to-trust match destination-address any
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy deny-dmz-to-trust match application any
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy deny-dmz-to-trust then deny

# ============================================================
# Security Policies — trust to dmz (management SSH)
# ============================================================
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy allow-mgmt-ssh match source-address mgmt-network
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy allow-mgmt-ssh match destination-address web-servers
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy allow-mgmt-ssh match application app-ssh
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy allow-mgmt-ssh then permit

set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy deny-trust-to-dmz match source-address any
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy deny-trust-to-dmz match destination-address any
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy deny-trust-to-dmz match application any
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone dmz policy deny-trust-to-dmz then deny

# ============================================================
# Security Policies — trust to untrust (outbound)
# ============================================================
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone untrust policy allow-outbound-web match source-address any
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone untrust policy allow-outbound-web match destination-address any
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone untrust policy allow-outbound-web match application web-services
set security policies from-zone trust to-zone untrust policy allow-outbound-web then permit

# Note: default-deny is implicit in Juniper SRX and not explicitly listed here
